verdict_reasoning: TGFB1 is a secreted cytokine with no intrinsic TM domain. The dominant form is soluble or ECM-deposited (via LTBP). However, the latent TGFB1 small latent complex (LAP+TGF-β1) is stably tethered to the outer leaflet of activated Tregs, platelets, macrophages, and activated B cells via GARP (LRRC32) and LRRC33 — both type I TM proteins — through documented covalent and wash-resistant non-covalent interactions. This surface pool is not in equilibrium with the soluble pool. Display is cell-state restricted (activation-dependent), making this contextual/stable_surface_attachment rather than yes.
